prompt.content:
Forecast the pro-forma IS of the merger between RMBS and SLAB for 2025 – 2029 copying the format of the Pro Forma Forecast.  

For SLAB figures:
1.	Populate the 2024 and TTM numbers from the SLAB financials. 
2.	Populate the following historical numbers for 2022 and 2023 for SLAB:
a.	Revenue
b.	Cost of Revenue
c.	Sales, general and administrative
d.	Other operating expense
e.	Interest income and other income (expense), net
f.	Provision for (benefit from) income taxes
g.	Weighted-average diluted shares 

Assume historical trends will continue and use the 2023 – 2024 averages for growth rates and margins for SLAB; future WASO equals the SLAB pro forma value.
Assume that annual SG&A synergies will be 20% of the Synergies / Shared cost in the SLAB post forma.

Update the share price for RMBS and SLAB to the closing price at 01/05/2026.

Calculate and output the projected EPS accretion or dilution % in 2027 with 2 decimal places.

rubrics.name: States the projected EPS accretion or dilution % in 2027 is -38.41%... (ver_ca1c5fd9fac24580a894cbd0fe5a0bfd)

messages.content: States the projected EPS accretion or dilution % in 2027 is -38.41% (acceptable range -38.79% to -38.03%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: The projected EPS accretion or dilution % in 2027 is -38.41%
